testcase.name: pid-collapsible > emphasize prop adds border and shadow classes
pid-collapsible > emphasize false does not add border classes
pid-collapsible > darkMode "dark" applies text-white class to host
pid-collapsible > darkMode "light" does not apply text-white class
pid-collapsible > darkMode "dark" with emphasize adds dark border classes
pid-collapsible > darkMode "light" with emphasize adds light border classes
pid-collapsible > host has text-white class when dark mode is active
pid-collapsible > collapsed state adds inline-block class to host
pid-collapsible > open state adds block class to host
